name: RandomPool

unions.name: RandomPool
unions.comment:
Represents pooled data which can be randomly chosen.
The data are devided into two parts, named _pump_ and _pond_. Contents in pump are already chosen but not yet used. Contents in pond are yet to be chosen. This division is for implementing behavior like "the same thing never happens continuously".

values.name: count
values.comment: Returnes how many contents in the pool.

values.name: cycle
values.comment: Get one new element from the pond into pump, and changes the weight of the head and release it to the pond.
values.type: Basics.Float -> RandomPool.RandomPool a -> Random.Generator ( a, RandomPool.RandomPool a )

values.name: discard
values.comment: Removes the head of pump. Nothing occurs if the pump is empty.

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Creates new `randompool` with all the element in the list poured into pond and empty pump.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, a ) -> List.List ( Basics.Float, a ) -> RandomPool.RandomPool a

values.name: get
values.comment: Returns the head(the oldest element) of pump.

values.name: insertListWithRelativeWeight
values.comment:
Inserts arbitrary number of elements into the pond.
The first component of parameter list content is relative weight. (`1` means total weight before any of them are inserted.)
values.type: List.List ( Basics.Float, a ) -> RandomPool.RandomPool a -> RandomPool.RandomPool a

values.name: insertWithRelativeWeight
values.comment: Pour one new element into the pond. The first parameter is the relative weight of the added element. Relative weight of `1` means that the new element has the same weight as the total of all other elements in the pond.
values.type: Basics.Float -> a -> RandomPool.RandomPool a -> RandomPool.RandomPool a

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Creates new `randompool` with only one element in the pond and empty pump.

values.name: suck
values.comment: Random generator that generates RandomePool which consists of pump with one more element randomly chosen from the pond and pond with that element removed.

values.name: totalWeight
values.comment: Returnes the sum of weight in the pool represented as `WideFloat`.
